action.reasoning: Observation: DDP training failed with SIGTERM. Previous eval gave mIoU=0.0007 (random) because nvidia/mit-b5 decode head is randomly initialized - it's a backbone-only model. Analysis: Need reliable training with DataParallel + SegFormerWrapper (returns plain tensor for DP compatibility). Train decode head from scratch with pretrained backbone, differential LR (10x higher for head). Decision: Write clean train.py with DataParallel, 30 epochs, validation every 2 epochs. Update predict.py with same wrapper for DP compatibility + TTA.
